rationale: Gov't Code §2306.081 governs TDHCA project compliance monitoring and database requirements for housing projects. It does not reference or depend on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: The department, through the division with responsibility for compliance matters, shall monitor for compliance with all applicable requirements the entire construction phase associated with any project under this chapter.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this housing compliance statute.
